{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230403280145BFB60D4347D4177C"}"},"total":225},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7582033671476019993","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书里面对于大战时的描述很精细，具体到每个人，每种生物都是有发挥作用的，并没有刻意突出强调个人龙傲天打法，反而将重点放在团队上，观感超级好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765334291,"group_id":"7556556725088685080","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4339092365253264"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556556725088685080","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"198"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26348,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7571663996157346585","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我只能说这是我看过的最符合我对异兽异植的一本书，从主角的职业和天赋到后续的情节发展都是围绕着伙伴展开的，并没有很俗套的龙傲天打脸以及后宫情节，非常适合种田+发展文爱好者入坑。而且里面对于异兽异植的描述也非常清晰，并非是一句简短的介绍和后续的疲乏无力，而是以其为重点发展。当然我也因为自身原因发了一个略显急躁的段评，希望作者大大不要介意，当然最希望的还是作者大大千万不要断更[爱慕][爱慕]","text_exts":[{"e":62,"s":59,"text":"龙傲天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420980847D4177C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227571663996157346585%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227556556725088685080%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762919956,"group_id":"7556556725088685080","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0mpHTSQbuHYJ1uGMFmbjqxeym/EyrUAepdPRbRljUhf","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4339092365253264","user_name":"斗丹的姜羽衣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4339092365253264","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556556725088685080","book_info":{"abstract":"【无女主、天灾、求生、种田、动物伙伴、特殊植物、幕后、基地建设、日常安排、无杀伐果断】
——摘自《李长青的生存日志》
【灾变第1天，秋】激活了天赋“逆齿”，代价巨大，但……我活下来了。
【灾变第18天，秋】“流水岩地”的盟友送来了鱼，我们种出了能发光的作物。末日里，一点微光也显得珍贵。
【灾变第45天，冬】 冰雪与死亡的第一日。我们失去了很多，但守住了这个溶洞。我们活下来了，这就够了。
【灾变第77天，冬】
凯尔启程返回家族，彬哥和墨菲也前往银松城。庇护所突然安静得能听见火星迸裂的声音。我必须让这里更坚固，才能等他们回来。
【灾变第90天，早春】它们来了。如黑色潮水，源源不断。
但我的魔植已然怒放，我的箭矢淬满寒霜。
【灾变第97天，春】
新的月圆之夜，即将来临。
这一次，我的魔植围墙更加坚固，我的箭袋也更加充盈。
这里是我的家园。
无论来的是兽潮，亡灵，还是隐藏在黑暗中的其他什么东西……
新的回合，这次我是庄家。
（本书又名：真实游戏，我的种田生存日志）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5e1726bb1ab1b261a21b21822e90ade1","author":"夺百声","author_id":"","book_id":"7556556725088685080","book_name":"深渊边陲的绿色奇迹","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7556582003223560728","read_count":"14662","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1184410"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"597","tags":"游戏体育,宠物,网游,求生,无女主,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/beb24d5f7ad61ef78ac2fe7dc13e1540~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393808&x-signature=YjAJ8fHKFILB1NIo7x7BRXf86C8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1745662272630536","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"107"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230403280145BFB60D4347D4177C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_
